ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract with the team */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract with the team */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in the real world */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the team's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's fantasy football team */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the user in the fantasy game */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the user in the fantasy game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected player */,
  "gameweek" INTEGER /* Gameweek for which the player was selected */,
  "selected_date" TEXT /* Date when the player was selected */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player was the captain of the user's team in the gameweek */,
  "vice_captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player was the vice-captain of the user's team in the gameweek */,
  "bench" INTEGER /* Whether the player was on the bench in the gameweek */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the selection data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
